title: Progyny, Inc. to Present at BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference
author: Not Specified
description: Progyny's CEO Pete Anevski and CFO Mark Livingston will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference on May 12, 2026. The company reported record first quarter 2026 revenue of $328.5 million, reflecting strong demand for women's health and family building solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported record first quarter revenue of $328.5 million and demonstrated robust demand for its solutions. Leadership participation in major healthcare conferences and multiple industry recognitions (TIME100, CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes Best Employers) indicate strong market position and growth trajectory.

title: Progyny, Inc. Announces Details for Its First Quarter 2026 Results Report
author: Na
description: Progyny, Inc. (Nasdaq: PGNY), a women's health and family building solutions company, announced it will report its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, followed by a conference call. The company also announced the launch of the industry's first fully insured supplemental fertility plan for small employers, marking 10 years of operations in redefining women's health and family building care.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is announcing a milestone product launch (first fully insured supplemental fertility plan), celebrating 10 years of operations, and has received multiple industry recognitions (TIME100, CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes Best Employers). The expansion of access to fertility benefits for small employers demonstrates business growth and market expansion.

title: Progyny, Inc. Announces Details for Its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Report
author: Na
description: Progyny, Inc. announced it will report its financial results for Q4 2025 and full year 2025 on February 26, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call at 4:45 p.m. ET to discuss results. A live webcast will be available on the company's investor relations website.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a factual announcement of upcoming earnings results and conference call details. No forward-looking statements, guidance changes, or performance metrics are disclosed that would indicate positive or negative sentiment. It is purely informational regarding the timing and logistics of the earnings announcement.

title: CEO Peter Anevski Buys $1.9 Million of Progyny Stock: Should Investors Buy Too?
author: Josh Kohn-Lindquist
description: Progyny's CEO Peter Anevski purchased 79,500 shares worth approximately $1.9 million, increasing his direct ownership to 680,251 shares. The purchase signals confidence in the company's performance, which has seen 9% sales growth and near-100% customer retention.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong financial performance, 60% total return in past year, continued sales growth, high customer retention, and CEO's significant stock purchase indicate positive company outlook

title: Why Progyny Stock Is Soaring Today
author: Josh Kohn-Lindquist
description: Progyny reported strong Q3 earnings with 9% sales growth and 23% adjusted growth, maintaining high client retention and demonstrating resilience after losing Amazon as a customer.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Exceeded analyst expectations, showed 23% adjusted sales growth, maintained near-100% client retention, and has strong financial position with $300M cash and $200M stock buyback
Dropped as a major customer, perceived as focusing on cost-cutting rather than comprehensive employee benefits
